mapper.select: /** UsptRsltIdxIemDao.select */ select rslt_idx_iem_id , rslt_id , rslt_idx_id , pruf_attachment_id , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_rslt_idx_iem where rslt_idx_iem_id = #{rsltIdxIemId}

/** UsptRsltIdxIemDao.selectList */ select urii.rslt_idx_iem_id , urii.rslt_idx_id , urii.pruf_attachment_id , ubri.rslt_idx_nm , ubri.rslt_idx_type_cd from uspt_rslt_idx_iem urii inner join uspt_bsns_rslt_idx ubri on ubri.rslt_idx_id = urii.rslt_idx_id where urii.rslt_id = #{rsltId} order by urii.rslt_idx_iem_id
